title: Vandevi Temple
tagline: Vandevi Temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Vandevi Dham, is the Temple of Vandevi and is located at a distance of about 6 km from Renukut, about 76 km from Robertsganj on Renukut-Shaktinagar Road, 1 km ahead of Rihand Dam i
overview.description: Vandevi Dham, is the Temple of Vandevi and is located at a distance of about 6 km from Renukut, about 76 km from Robertsganj on Renukut-Shaktinagar Road, 1 km ahead of Rihand Dam in Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh. The Vandevi temple is dedicated to Vandevi, the Goddess of forest.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nyotini
topPlaces.description: Nyotini is a town and nagar panchayat in Hasanganj tehsil of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Located 3 km southeast of Hasanganj on the right bank of the Sai river, Nyotini was historically one of the main centres of Muslim settlement in the district and it has several mosques and shrines.

topPlaces.name: Ganges Barrage
topPlaces.description: The Ganges Barrage, officially named as the Lav Khush Barrage, is a bridge across the Ganges river at Azad Nagar-Nawabganj near Kanpur's Marine drive Atal Ghat in Kanpur. Construction started in 1995 and it was inaugurated in May 2000.

topPlaces.name: Kanpur Zoological Park
topPlaces.description: Kanpur Zoological Park or Allen Forest Zoo (Hindi: कानपुर चिड़ियाघर / कानपुर प्राणी उद्यान), also called the Kanpur Zoo is a 110-hectare (270-acre) zoo in Kanpur, a large city in Northern India. It is the largest open green space in Kanpur and the largest zoological park in North India.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya IIT Kanpur
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya IIT Kanpur is a school situated in the IIT Kanpur campus, Kanpur in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It was established in 1965 and is part of the Kendriya Vidyalaya system of schools.

topPlaces.name: Sikandarpur, Sikandarpur Sarausi
topPlaces.description: Sikandarpur is a village in Sikandarpur Sarausi block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Located 10 km northwest of the city of Unnao, near the Barkota lake, it serves as the block headquarters as well as the seat of a nyaya panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Gurudev Chauraha metro station
topPlaces.description: Gurudev Chauraha is a metro station on the East-West corridor of the Orange Line of Kanpur Metro in Kanpur, India. The station was opened on 28 December 2021 as part of the inaugural section of Kanpur Metro, between IIT Kanpur and Moti Jheel.

topPlaces.name: Geeta Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: Geeta Nagar is a metro station on the East-West corridor of the Orange Line of Kanpur Metro in Kanpur, India. The station was opened on 28 December 2021 as part of the inaugural section of Kanpur Metro, between IIT Kanpur and Moti Jheel.

topPlaces.name: Rawatpur metro station
topPlaces.description: Rawatpur is a metro station on the East-West corridor of the Orange Line of Kanpur Metro in Kanpur, India. The station was opened on 28 December 2021 as part of the inaugural section of Kanpur Metro, between IIT Kanpur and Moti Jheel.

items.note: Nyotini is a town and nagar panchayat in Hasanganj tehsil of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Located 3 km southeast of Hasanganj on the right bank of the Sai river, Nyotini was historically one of the main centres of Muslim settlement in the district and it has several mosques and shrines.

The Ganges Barrage, officially named as the Lav Khush Barrage, is a bridge across the Ganges river at Azad Nagar-Nawabganj near Kanpur's Marine drive Atal Ghat in Kanpur. Construction started in 1995 and it was inaugurated in May 2000.

Kanpur Zoological Park or Allen Forest Zoo (Hindi: कानपुर चिड़ियाघर / कानपुर प्राणी उद्यान), also called the Kanpur Zoo is a 110-hectare (270-acre) zoo in Kanpur, a large city in Northern India. It is the largest open green space in Kanpur and the largest zoological park in North India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vandevi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vandevi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vandevi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Kanpur Central (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vandevi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vandevi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vandevi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vandevi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vandevi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nyotini, Ganges Barrage, Kanpur Zoological Park, Kendriya Vidyalaya IIT Kanpur, Sikandarpur, Sikandarpur Sarausi.
